scores.correctness_notes: The priority order is wrong: agent lists error > blocked > waiting > maintenance > active, but the gold standard specifies error > blocked > maintenance > waiting > active (maintenance outranks waiting). The agent also omits the important note that calling add_status() with ErrorStatus or UnknownStatus is an error. The collect_app_status example includes an unnecessary `self.unit.is_leader()` guard (the event only fires on the leader already), which is misleading.
scores.hallucination_notes: No fabricated APIs or parameters. All method names, event names, and class names used exist in the ops framework.
